demo.pageSub: A placeholder tour that exercises the tour engine — start, step through, skip, and resume.
demo.controlsSub: Start the demo tour, skip it at any step, or replay it from the beginning.

targets.profile: Your account and preferences live here.
targets.nav: Move between areas of the app from here.
targets.work: Your tasks and active work show up here.

welcome.title: Welcome to the tour
welcome.body: This short walkthrough points at parts of the screen and explains what they do. You can skip any time.

profile.title: Profile & account
profile.body: Open your profile to manage your account, preferences, and language.

nav.title: Navigation
nav.body: Use the navigation to move between your work, projects, and settings.

work.title: My work
work.body: Your assigned tasks and in-flight work appear here. That's the end of the demo — thanks for trying it!

welcome.title: Welcome to Eduba
welcome.body: Here's a quick tour of the essentials — your profile, navigation, work, settings, and how to create new work. You can skip any time.

profile.title: Profile & account
profile.body: Open the account menu to manage your profile, switch preferences, and sign out.

navigation.title: Navigation
navigation.body: Move between My Work, projects, workflows, and the rest of the app from the sidebar.

myWork.title: My Work
myWork.body: Your assigned tasks and active work live here. Filter, group, and open them to get started.

settings.title: Settings & configuration
settings.body: Tune Eduba to suit you — try switching the theme right here, and find every setting in the menus.

creatingWork.title: Creating work
creatingWork.body: Ready to start something? Use New Task to launch a workflow, fill in the details, and assign it.
